verses.text: Pure oil keeps the lamps burning continually. The lamps. Light shines ever before God.
Pure oil keeps the lamps burning continually. The lamps. Light shines ever before God.
Pure oil keeps the lamps burning continually. The lamps. Light shines ever before God.
Pure oil keeps the lamps burning continually. The lamps. Light shines ever before God.
Twelve loaves of shewbread are set in two rows each sabbath. Shewbread. The tribes are remembered before God.
Twelve loaves of shewbread are set in two rows each sabbath. Shewbread. The tribes are remembered before God.
Twelve loaves of shewbread are set in two rows each sabbath. Shewbread. The tribes are remembered before God.
Twelve loaves of shewbread are set in two rows each sabbath. Shewbread. The tribes are remembered before God.
Twelve loaves of shewbread are set in two rows each sabbath. Shewbread. The tribes are remembered before God.
A man blasphemes the Name and is put in ward. Blasphemy. God's name is not lightly used.
A man blasphemes the Name and is put in ward. Blasphemy. God's name is not lightly used.
A man blasphemes the Name and is put in ward. Blasphemy. God's name is not lightly used.
God commands the blasphemer be stoned. Stoned. Reviling God is a deadly sin.
God commands the blasphemer be stoned. Stoned. Reviling God is a deadly sin.
God commands the blasphemer be stoned. Stoned. Reviling God is a deadly sin.
God commands the blasphemer be stoned. Stoned. Reviling God is a deadly sin.
He that kills a man dies; he that kills a beast repays. Life for life. Justice values life.
He that kills a man dies; he that kills a beast repays. Life for life. Justice values life.
'Breach for breach, eye for eye'; the penalty fits the crime. Just measure. The law metes out fairness.
'Breach for breach, eye for eye'; the penalty fits the crime. Just measure. The law metes out fairness.
They stone the blasphemer as God commanded. Carried out. The sentence is fulfilled.
They stone the blasphemer as God commanded. Carried out. The sentence is fulfilled.
